title: Echo Recovery Compass
description: Edits the recovery compass to look cooler.
body:
Replaces the off-centered needle in the compass with a high-tech display.

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06e0f388dc98f5490ac1202ec8cae016ac0bfa32_0.webp)

This resourcepack brings no changes to the functionality of recovery compasses.
